raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "affirmative declaration of post-awakening action and commitment to transmission and application",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "a spiritual awakening occurs as a direct result of completing the preceding steps",
    "this awakening generates an obligation or impulse to transmit the message to alcoholics",
    "the principles derived from the steps remain applicable and beneficial across all domains of life",
    "the sequence of awakening followed by service constitutes a coherent spiritual process"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally consistent within a teleological framework that treats awakening as both outcome and cause of further ethical action",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "the steps reliably produce verifiable improvements in sobriety and well-being; the transmitted message demonstrably aids recipients; ongoing practice of the principles yields measurable personal and social benefit",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "no causal link exists between the steps and any awakening; the message produces net harm or false hope; the principles prove ineffective or harmful when applied universally"
}
